---
description: "Converts the test plan generated by copilot-playwright-test-planner into actual Playwright test files that can be executed"
agent: "copilot-playwright-test-generator"
tools: ['edit', 'read', 'search', 'execute', 'agent']
---

Converts the generated test plan at specs/${app}/${test_path}.md into executable Playwright test files.
- Output Directory: tests/${app}/${test_path}.ts
